title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Om Logistics

jsonLd.title: Immediate Requirement Logistics Manager at Om Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Om Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Logistics Manager at our Ahmedabad location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Om Logistics:
Om Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in Route Optimization
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in Fleet Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Om Logistics!
